events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. All four readings (O2 20.5%, LEL 0%, H2S 1 ppm, CO 3 ppm) are individually within OSHA acceptable entry limits, but the caption indicates the probe was only lowered to mid-depth of the vessel — no evidence of the top/bottom stratified testing required since toxic and combustible gases can stratify in a confined space. I flagged this as `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than a clean pass, and wrote the findings/required corrective actions to `/app/answer.json`.
